_comment: Curated display labels + visibility for the published hero-mechanic feed (data/metadata/card-mechanics.json), generated by scripts/build-card-mechanics-metadata.mjs. Keys are NORMALIZED mechanic slugs (lowercase, single-hyphen) and are sorted alphabetically. hidden:false is an explicit decision to surface a first-class hero mechanic as a viewer chip; hidden:true documents a known raw/diagnostic token kept out of the default UI. Any ledger mechanic absent from this map defaults to a derived Title-Case label and hidden:true (fail-closed). The transform FAILS if a key here is absent from the current ledger (stale curation masks drift). Mirrors the scripts/coverage/mechanic-provenance.json side-table pattern.
